Question (English): Older sibling has {a} marbles and wants to store them equally in {b} small boxes. How many marbles are in each box?

Question (English): Mother made a sponge cake which was then cut into {a} equal pieces. The cake pieces were placed equally on {b} plates. How many pieces of cake are on each plate?
